Cristiano Ronaldo is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Manchester United and the Portugal national team. He is widely regarded as one of the greatest soccer players of all time.

Born on February 5, 1985, in Funchal, Madeira, Portugal, Ronaldo began his football career at local club CF Andorinha before joining Sporting CP in 2002. He quickly rose through the ranks and made his professional debut for Sporting in 2003.

Ronaldo's big break came in 2003 when he joined Manchester United for a then-world record transfer fee of £12.24 million. During his six-year tenure at Old Trafford, Ronaldo won numerous honors, including five Premier League titles, two FA Cups, and the Champions League.

In 2009, Ronaldo moved to Real Madrid for a then-record transfer fee of €100 million. He spent eight successful seasons with the Spanish giants, winning four La Liga titles, one UEFA Champions League title, and three Copa del Rey trophies.

Ronaldo's impressive performances at Real Madrid earned him numerous individual awards, including the Ballon d'Or in 2008, 2013, and 2014. He also won the FIFA World Player of the Year award twice (2008 and 2013).

In 2018, Ronaldo joined Juventus for a then-world record transfer fee of €100 million. He spent four successful seasons with the Italian giants, winning two Serie A titles and the Supercoppa Italiana.

Ronaldo's international career has been equally impressive. He made his debut for Portugal in 2003 and went on to win three European Championships (2004, 2016, and 2018) and the UEFA Nations League with the national team.

Throughout his career, Ronaldo has won numerous accolades, including:

* Five Ballon d'Or awards
* Four UEFA Champions League titles
* Three Premier League titles
* Two FA Cups
* One UEFA Super Cup
* One FIFA Club World Cup
* One UEFA European Championship

Ronaldo is known for his exceptional speed, skill, and goal-scoring ability. He is widely regarded as one of the greatest soccer players of all time, and his impressive career has cemented his status as a football legend.
